name: Multiple Failed API Requests From The Same Username (AWS)
notes: This rule triggers when at least 10 failed API requests have been initiated from the same username in two minutes.
bb_references: BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied
BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Username in 2 minutes
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Username in 2 minutes
thresholds: when BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Username in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Failed API Requests From The Same Username (AWS) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Username in 2 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Failed API Requests From The Same Username (AWS)
Event description: Detects when at least 10 failed API requests have been initiated from the same username in two minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
